research_cycle.selection_rule: latest completed earnings cycle at the time collection began
selection_basis: NVIDIA Investor Relations Q1 FY2027 results announcement

known_gaps: The four stored SEC snapshots are browser-normalized DOM, not byte-identical HTTP response bodies.
Three discovered NVIDIA IR artifacts have not been captured.
No official text transcript of the earnings call has been identified; the official webcast is available.
Pre-earnings consensus requires a timestamped licensed or internal source.
Industry-context sources have not yet been selected.
No internal model or prior thesis has been provided.

notes: This manifest records coverage and scope. It does not contain an investment view.
